human_actions_pending.context: Backend: uv run uvicorn packages.api.src.api.app:app --reload --port 8000. Frontend: pnpm --filter web dev. Then open http://localhost:3000/dashboard

human_actions_pending.context: Need an actual opt run in DB first — run: python scripts/run_opt.py --config ... to populate opt_results

decisions.decision: Split Chart.tsx into two useEffects: Effect 1 handles chart lifecycle + ORB levels (deps: bars, orbHigh, orbLow). Effect 2 applies trade overlays imperatively via seriesRef + chartKey (deps: trades, chartKey).
decisions.rationale: trades in Effect 1 deps caused the chart to destroy/recreate when trades arrived after bars, reading clientHeight=0 after chart.remove() cleared inline styles. Two-effect approach prevents this by keeping chart lifecycle stable.

decisions.decision: _find_repo_root now walks to the OUTERMOST pyproject.toml, not the first one found
decisions.rationale: Original implementation returned the first (innermost) pyproject.toml, which could be a package root rather than the repo root, causing _EQUITY_ROOT and _OPT_EQUITY_ROOT to point to wrong paths.

decisions.decision: DuckDB write connection closed before ProcessPoolExecutor dispatch in run_opt.py
decisions.rationale: DuckDB does not allow concurrent access — workers opening read-only connections failed when the orchestrator held the write connection open.

next_action: Remove debug console.logs from Chart.tsx (search for '[Chart]', '[dash]', '[useBars]'), dashboard/page.tsx, and useBars.ts. Then commit all changes cleanly. Then ask user to browser-verify /dashboard.
context_notes: Phase 04 is 100% complete. This ad-hoc session layered two things: (1) the Chart.tsx two-effect refactor (the real root-cause fix for the StrictMode/chart.remove() height-0 bug) and (2) a bonus feature — optimizations page row selection + per-result OOS equity curve. Both are uncommitted. Debug logs sprinkled in Chart.tsx, dashboard/page.tsx, useBars.ts need cleanup before commit. Next planned phase is Phase 5 (Risk Manager + Full Audit + Controls).
